overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a wet urban intersection at night in a video game (GTA V). The scene features moderate traffic with large trucks and cars passing by, illuminated by street lights and commercial building lights reflecting off the wet pavement.

events.description: white box truck enters from right and passes through the intersection
large BIG G GOODS semi-truck approaches from the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wet intersection, approaching the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white box truck moving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: tall pole with red traffic lights hanging over the intersection
lit storefronts and commercial structures visible in the background
yellow sodium vapor street lamps lining the road
large industrial structure with roll-up garage door and yellow lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a wet urban intersection at night, with the camera positioned at the crosswalk looking across multi-lane asphalt. Traffic lights glow red in the distance, and commercial buildings with illuminated signs line the background. A white box truck passes through the intersection as the camera begins to move forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing with heavy truck traffic

events.description: first-person hand becomes visible at bottom of frame, confirming pedestrian perspective
red semi-truck with BIG G GOODS trailer turns left through the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing to cross the intersection, passing close to large trucks and navigating through traffic

notable_agents.action: large red semi-truck with BIG G GOODS trailer turning left through the intersection

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the intersection, the camera passes close to a massive red semi-truck with a BIG G GOODS trailer that is turning through the crosswalk. The first-person perspective is confirmed when a hand briefly enters the frame. Street lights illuminate the wet asphalt as vehicles continue to navigate the intersection from multiple directions.

events.description: orange sport motorcycle with rider in red jacket passes by on the left
white SUV and black sedan navigate the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: nearing the far side of the intersection as various vehicles including a motorcycle pass through

notable_agents.action: orange sport motorcycle with rider wearing red jacket accelerating through the intersection

entered.detail: street sign visible near the traffic light pole on the right side

segments.scene_description: Approaching the far side of the intersection, an orange sport motorcycle with a rider in a red jacket passes by on the left. The camera continues moving forward as a white SUV and other vehicles cross the intersection. The traffic light pole recedes into the background on the left as the camera prepares to exit the main crossing area.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside urban road with guardrail

events.description: stepping onto the sidewalk and away from the main intersection crossing
turning left to follow the sidewalk path alongside the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk next to the road, separated by a guardrail

entered.detail: low concrete barrier separating the sidewalk from the street traffic
grey electrical utility box situated on the sidewalk
trees and bushes lining the left side of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open intersection onto a narrower concrete sidewalk, separated from the road by a concrete guardrail. Trees and bushes line the left side of the path while vehicles continue to pass by on the right. The commercial buildings and traffic lights of the intersection fade into the background as the camera follows the sidewalk curve.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the center of a bustling, rain-slicked urban intersection toward the quiet periphery of a city sidewalk. It begins at a crosswalk looking across multi-lane asphalt where red traffic lights glow and a white box truck passes through the frame. As the camera moves deeper into the intersection, it passes closely beside a massive red semi-truck with a BIG G GOODS trailer, with a hand briefly entering the frame to confirm the perspective. The scene then shifts as an orange sport motorcycle and a white SUV navigate the crossing, while the traffic light pole recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera transitions from the open road onto a narrower concrete sidewalk, moving past trees and bushes as the bright lights of the intersection fade into the background.
